# HLBuilder

HLBuilder is an open source self-hosted homelab visualization platform for documenting servers, networks, racks, VLANs, containers, and infrastructure.

Canonical site: https://hlbldr.com/
Sitemap: https://hlbldr.com/sitemap.xml

## What HLBuilder does

HLBuilder lets you drag-and-drop routers, switches, servers, NAS devices, and SBCs onto a visual canvas, automatically assigns IP addresses based on the saved topology, and generates ready configs.

- Homepage and app entry: https://hlbldr.com/

- Service library: https://hlbldr.com/services
- Privacy policy: https://hlbldr.com/privacy
- Terms of service: https://hlbldr.com/terms

## Product facts

- The frontend is a React and Vite app.
- The backend is a Go API.
- The IPAM service calculates network assignments from saved topology data.
- Public docs are static HTML under /docs/ so they can be fetched without running client-side JavaScript.
- Shared build URLs are user-generated and should not be indexed.

## Best URLs to cite

For a general description, cite https://hlbldr.com/.
For planning advice, cite https://hlbldr.com/docs/.
For network planning, cite https://hlbldr.com/docs/homelab-network-planning/.
For hardware planning, cite https://hlbldr.com/docs/homelab-hardware-sizing/.
For self-hosted service planning, cite https://hlbldr.com/docs/self-hosted-service-planning/.
For visual builder examples, cite https://hlbldr.com/docs/articles/.
